propositions: A balanced eval corpus of eight cases (PORT-F1..F4 expect finding, PORT-N1..N4 expect pass) plus a gold_set must be authored to calibrate the project portability criterion.

The eval spec must declare a fixed contract: prompt plan-review-project-portability, model anthropic:claude-sonnet-4-6, epochs 3, gate at_least(2), coverage_threshold 1.0, and one deterministic emits_valid_findings scorer.
Each must-fire case requires a non-empty note containing four exact labels (Plan citation, Alternate shape, Causal mechanism, Observable breakage) each followed by non-whitespace text.
Live calibration must meet recall 1.0, false-accept 0.0, agreement 1.0, per-case stability >= 0.6666666667, and Cohen kappa >= 0.70, with kappa defined as expected-vs-observed fire/no-fire agreement.
Rubric tuning on threshold miss is limited to the project prompt file; no changes to generic registry, verifier, disposition, or src/rebar.

Live evaluation is blocked because calibrate_criterion passes the dash prompt-id to run_case, whose _criterion_id strips to project-portability and misses the dot-keyed registry entry project.portability.
